instruction: I have 4 Python files with bugs. Each file contains exactly one logic bug (not a syntax error). Please find and fix the bug in each file. The 4 files are: binary_search.py (binary search with off-by-one boundary error), string_utils.py (longest common prefix with wrong length selection), math_utils.py (prime check with incorrect range boundary), list_utils.py (flatten with missing recursive call). You can run the unit tests in the tests/ directory to verify your fixes. The 4 files are independent so you can assign each to a separate agent for parallel processing.
